summary.intent: Add a test banner to the layered products build job that displays '[TEST]' for test assemblies, matching the existing pattern in the OCP Brew pipeline.
summary.outcome: Researched the OCP Brew pipeline pattern, created a git branch from prod/main, and began applying the code changes. Final completion (commit, push, PR) status unclear from transcript.

repo: OCP Brew pipeline (ocp.py) has [TEST] banner logic for test assemblies, but OCP Konflux and layered products pipelines do not
Repository uses fork-based workflow: origin=ashwindasr/art-tools (fork), prod=openshift-eng/art-tools (upstream)
Branches are created from prod/main, pushed to origin, then PR'd to prod

code.finding: Test banner pattern: checks if 'test' in assembly.lower() and adds '[TEST]' banner record
Target file for adding test banner logic, similar to ocp.py pattern

workflow: Plan mode blocks editing non-markdown files - must switch to agent mode for code changes
Need to explicitly request mode switch from user when blocked by plan mode restrictions

friction: Multiple failed StrReplace attempts while stuck in plan mode
Had to explicitly ask user to switch to agent mode to proceed with code edits
open_items: Code changes may need to be committed
Changes need to be pushed to origin
Pull request to prod needs to be created
